title: Convert Agent Factory to onboarding planner wizard
summary: Replaced the single-form Agent Factory UX with a guided question flow that validates required answers before generation.
changes: Added an onboarding step model for advanced agent generation questions.
Added progress indicator, back/next controls, and required-field gating.
Added onboarding summary panel with completion state and pending answers.
Kept existing generation API contract while improving frontend flow quality.
risks: Longer wizard flow may add friction for power users who preferred direct full-form editing.
rollback: Keep backend factory route and reference sheet persistence unchanged.
